classification.domain: AI assistant gateway security for regulated enclaves

topic.what: Hard-fork hardening framework for single-user AI assistant gateways providing Bell-LaPadula mandatory access control, module signing, DLP scanning, and hash-chained tamper-evident audit
topic.how: Two-flavor architecture (open/enclaved) with data-driven classification ladder; removes 78 cloud modules; enforces deny-by-default egress; Ed25519 module signing with clearance-aware trust root; attested MCP peer trust; rollback buffer with LIFO semantics
topic.why_matters: Regulated industries (finance MNPI, healthcare PHI, defense CUI) need attestable peer trust, signed-module loading, tamper-evident audit, and deny-by-default external connectivity that upstream consumer-focused AI gateways fundamentally cannot provide

characteristics.evidence: 146 unit tests + 58 adversarial pen-tests all pass on Node 22 in ~0.4s
characteristics.context: 204 tests cover classification, DLP, policy, module loading, crypto, egress guard, HITL, transaction buffer, key broker, MCP attestation, prompt injection, code injection

characteristics.vs_baseline: 78 forbidden modules removed (25 cloud channels, 45 cloud LLM providers, 8 external search/browser/webhook)
characteristics.context: 25 cloud channels (WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, etc.), 45 cloud LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.), 8 external search modules

characteristics.evidence: Table 5: 22 TypeScript files, ~2500 LOC in src/enclawed/
characteristics.context: All 22 files type-check clean under tsc --strict --noEmit

characteristics.evidence: Section 4.3: five built-in presets (generic, US-government, healthcare-HIPAA, financial-services, generic-3-tier)
characteristics.context: Table 6 shows rank mapping across presets; custom JSON scheme supported with rank-contiguity and name-uniqueness validation invariants

characteristics.vs_baseline: 0-2 for competitors (Open WebUI, LibreChat, NeMo Guardrails, etc.)
characteristics.evidence: Table 1 comparison: only enclawed combines local-only, mand. signed modules, class. lattice, tamper-evident audit, DLP at output, HITL stop, TX rollback, attested peer trust, sector-neutral config
characteristics.context: Competitors address 1-2 properties; enclawed is the only entry combining all nine as host-level framework

characteristics.what_it_measures: regulatory frameworks mapped to enclave surface
characteristics.evidence: Table 3: NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, NIST CSF 2.0, SOC 2 TSC, GDPR, HIPAA Security Rule, PCI DSS, CMMC/NIST 800-171
characteristics.context: Deploying organization picks column matching its regime; framework maps to AC-3/4/16, AU-2/3/9/10, IA-7, SI-4/7/12, etc.

good_for: government enclaves requiring FIPS assertion and peer attestation
R&D environments with embargoed clinical-trial data
requires: local inference only (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, SGLang, NVIDIA NIM)
